html:
Exclusive to:

The Craftsmerm House is a Structure exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter, requires 4 Boards, 3 Cut Reeds, and 2 Freshwater Fishes to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It can only be placed on Marsh Turf.

Unlike regular Mermhouses, Craftsmerm Houses can only hold one single Merm. Craftsmerm Houses don't spawn Merms in the winter. When placed in winter, Craftsmerm Houses will not spawn any merms until spring. If killed, the Merm respawns after 2 days. Merms from Craftsmerm Houses don't go back to their house.

Skins

The wisdom of the Merms is beyond our understanding, and theirs too.
Woven - Elegant
Swamp Collection
Mossy Mermhouse
When visiting the swamp, these cute little houses are a mossy.

Trivia

  • Craftsmerm Houses were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Wurt Character Update.

“It's actually kind of cute.”
–Wilson
“Looks just as flammable as the old ones.”
–Willow
“Is house for fish men!”
–Wolfgang
“It has not yet been touched by the ravages of time.”
–Wendy
“IT IS UGLY”
–WX-78
“It's good to see her doing something constructive.”
–Wickerbottom
“Reminds me of the first house we built, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie
“It's slightly less offensive to my eyes than the others.”
–Maxwell
“A home fit for a fish beast.”
–Wigfrid
“What a funny little house.”
–Webber
“Oh! It looks... very nice!”
–Warly
“Glub Glub house”
–Wormwood
“Hm, I should teach that kid how to use a level.”
–Winona
“An abode fit for a toad, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Made it with own claws!”
–Wurt
“Bog monsters live in houses?”
–Walter
“A bit ramshackle, but definitely an improvement!”
–Wanda
The Craftsmerm House is a Structure exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Structures Filter and Survivor Items Filter, requires 4 Boards, 3 Cut Reeds, and 2 Freshwater Fishes to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It can only be placed on Marsh Turf.
Unlike regular Mermhouses, Craftsmerm Houses can only hold one single Merm. Craftsmerm Houses don't spawn Merms in the winter. When placed in winter, Craftsmerm Houses will not spawn any merms until spring. If killed, the Merm respawns after 2 days. Merms from Craftsmerm Houses don't go back to their house.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Nhà Craftsmerm là Công trình độc quyền của Wurt trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Cấu trúc và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Sống sót, yêu cầu 4 Ván ép, 3 Sậy Cắt và 2 Cá Nước Ngọt để chế tạo và Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó chỉ có thể được đặt trên Marsh Turf.
